shared_rules.hatch_consistency: Use the official Hatch mascot reference as the source of truth.

assets.hatch_variant: pointing narrator integrated into story scene
assets.alt: Hatch holding a camera pointed at a laptop showing a file sync demo, representing the Dropbox explainer video concept.
assets.caption: Hatch holding a camera pointed at a laptop showing a file sync demo, representing the Dropbox explainer video concept.
assets.prompt: Dropbox Explainer Video | hero: Hatch mascot (the HackProduct robot with the graduation cap and growth arrow) holding a small video camera pointed at a laptop screen showing a file sync animation. Hatch's expression is focused and entrepreneurial. Cream background, no speech bubble. Watermark: "HackProduct" wordmark bottom-right, 60% opacity, JetBrains Mono. Aspect 2400x1350. Use case: illustration-story. Use the official Hatch mascot as a strict character reference, not as a pasted sticker. Preserve Hatch's rounded green head frame, cream face/body, graduation cap, growth arrow, H chest mark, bright eyes, mitten hands, and friendly coach expression. No exact logos, no fake screenshots, no real person likenesses, no implied company endorsement. Do not include a watermark in the generated source because watermarking is applied after approval.
assets.crop_notes: Center-cover crop checked against role safe zone.
qa: Official Hatch reference required by prompt and manifest.
Watermark applied in post-processing.
No exact logos, fake screenshots, real person likenesses, or implied endorsement.
